stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes what is the required take-off fuel for an IFR Commercial Air Transport flight with a turbine engine jet aircraft? Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Taxi fuel (including APU usage): 150 kg
Fuel for the climb to cruise level: 1600 kg
Cruise distance to destination: 570 NAM
Cruise fuel consumption: 6 kg/NAM
Fuel for descent to the destination: 270 kg
Fuel for approach & landing destination: 450 kg
Contingency fuel: 5% of trip
Fuel for alternate: 2150 kg
Holding fuel flow at destination & alternate: 2200 kg/h
Missed approach fuel at alternate: 270 kg
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
